name: Daily Life Sentence Frames
description: Phase 2 recombinable frames for planning, opinions, stories, and problem-solving across the six engines plus daily-life loops.

frames.pinyin: wǒ de míngzi yǒu yìsi, yīnwèi {REASON_POS}.
frames.text_en: My name is interesting because [REASON_POS].
What do people usually call you?
I'm usually quite [STYLE].

frames.text: 你觉得你的名字怎么样？
frames.pinyin: nǐ juéde nǐ de míngzi zěnmeyàng?
frames.text_en: What do you think of your name?
Does this name have a story behind it?
How old are you?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: What do you think of it here?
What good food is there here?
you usually; in daily life to like to go [PLACE] question particle
Is it convenient living in [CITY]?

frames.speaker: partner
frames.text_en: Is it far from there?
I think [CITY] is [REASON_POS].

frames.pinyin: nǐ gēn jiārén zhù zài yīqǐ ma?
frames.speaker: partner
frames.text_en: Do you live with your family?

frames.text: 你最喜欢和家人一起做什么？
frames.pinyin: nǐ zuì xǐhuan hé jiārén yīqǐ zuò shénme?
frames.speaker: partner
frames.text_en: What do you most enjoy doing with your family?

frames.pinyin: nǐ gēn jiārén zhù zài yīqǐ ma?
frames.text_en: Do you live with your family?
How often do you see your family?
I; me with [FAMILY_ROLE] relationship very good
My [FAMILY_ROLE] has been very busy lately.

frames.text: 周末一般跟家人一起做什么？
frames.pinyin: zhōumò yībān gēn jiārén yīqǐ zuò shénme?
frames.text_en: weekend usually with family together to do what
Do you have children?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Are you married?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你为什么喜欢这份工作？
frames.pinyin: nǐ wèishénme xǐhuan zhè fèn gōngzuò?
frames.text_en: Why do you like this job?
frames.partner_why_answer_en: Because I get to help people.

frames.text_en: What work did you used to do?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Do you work at the moment?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: nǐ shì shuō nǐ tuìxiū le ma?
frames.text_en: Did you mean you are retired?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Is this job hard?
frames.partner_why_answer: 刚开始有点难，慢慢就好了。
frames.partner_why_answer_en: It was hard at first, but gets easier.

frames.text: 你工作里最难的部分是什么？
frames.pinyin: nǐ gōngzuò lǐ zuì nán de bùfen shì shénme?
frames.text_en: What is the hardest part of your work?
frames.partner_why_answer: 因为时间不够，压力比较大。
frames.partner_why_answer_en: Not enough time — quite a lot of pressure.

frames.text_en: Is this job well paid?

frames.text: 你推荐年轻人做这份工作吗？为什么？
frames.pinyin: nǐ tuījiàn niánqīngrén zuò zhè fèn gōngzuò ma? wèishénme?
frames.text_en: Do you recommend this job for young people? Why?
frames.partner_why_answer: 推荐，可以学很多，也能帮助别人。
frames.partner_why_answer_en: Yes — you learn a lot and can help people.

frames.text_en: When did you start [HOBBY]?
you why to like [HOBBY]
I find [HOBBY] [REASON_POS].
Do you find [HOBBY] difficult?

frames.pinyin: nǐ zuò le duō jiǔ le?
frames.text_en: How long have you been doing it?
Which countries have you been to?
Where do you like best?

frames.text: 那个地方有什么好玩的？
frames.pinyin: nàge dìfang yǒu shénme hǎowán de?
frames.text_en: What's fun to do there?

frames.text: 你觉得那次旅行怎么样？
frames.pinyin: nǐ juéde nà cì lǚxíng zěnmeyàng?
frames.text_en: you to feel; to think then; that how is it
The most memorable for me was [PLACE].
you [TIME] to have what plan
I'm planning to [ACTION].
When shall we meet?
Let's go to [PLACE] together!
See you [TIME] then.
What do you think of this?
I think it's pretty good.
Because [REASON_POS], I like it a lot.
Yesterday I [ACTION].
Later we went to [PLACE] again.

frames.text: 我觉得名字很有意思。给你取名字的时候有什么故事吗？
frames.pinyin: wǒ juéde míngzi hěn yǒu yìsi. gěi nǐ qǔ míngzi de shíhou yǒu shénme gùshi ma?
frames.text_en: I think names are really interesting. Was there a story when your name was chosen?

frames.text: 我觉得家人是最重要的。你最喜欢和家人一起做什么？
frames.pinyin: wǒ juéde jiārén shì zuì zhòngyào de. nǐ zuì xǐhuan hé jiārén yīqǐ zuò shénme?
frames.text_en: I think family is the most important thing. What do you most enjoy doing together with your family?

frames.text: 工作有时候挺累的。你喜欢你的工作吗？
frames.pinyin: gōngzuò yǒushíhou tǐng lèi de. nǐ xǐhuan nǐ de gōngzuò ma?
frames.text_en: Work can be tiring sometimes. Do you like your work?

frames.text: 我觉得有爱好很好。你的爱好是怎么开始的？
frames.pinyin: wǒ juéde yǒu àihào hěn hǎo. nǐ de àihào shì zěnme kāishǐ de?
frames.text_en: I think having hobbies is great. How did your hobby start?

frames.text: 旅行真的很有意思。旅行的时候你喜欢做什么？
frames.pinyin: lǚxíng zhēn de hěn yǒu yìsi. lǚxíng de shíhou nǐ xǐhuan zuò shénme?
frames.text_en: Travel is really very interesting. What do you like to do when travelling?

frames.text: 每个地方都不一样。你觉得你住的地方有什么好的？
frames.pinyin: měi gè dìfang dōu bù yīyàng. nǐ juéde nǐ zhù de dìfang yǒu shénme hǎo de?
frames.text_en: Every place is different. What do you think is good about where you live?

frames.text: 我最喜欢吃好吃的东西。你最喜欢什么食物？
frames.pinyin: wǒ zuì xǐhuan chī hǎochī de dōngxi. nǐ zuì xǐhuan shénme shíwù?
frames.text_en: I love eating delicious food. What is your favourite food?

frames.pinyin: nǐ xǐhuan zìjǐ de míngzi ma?
frames.text_en: Do you like your own name?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: What do your friends usually call you?

frames.text_en: That's quite interesting.

frames.text: 你打算在那里长期住下去吗？
frames.pinyin: nǐ dǎsuàn zài nàlǐ chángjī zhù xiàqù ma?
frames.text_en: Do you plan to stay there long-term?

frames.pinyin: nà nǐ hěn yǒu jīngyàn le.

frames.text: 你怎么开始做这个工作的？
frames.pinyin: nǐ zěnme kāishǐ zuò zhège gōngzuò de?
frames.text_en: How did you get started in this work?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 这是你当时想做的工作吗？
frames.pinyin: zhè shì nǐ dāngshí xiǎng zuò de gōngzuò ma?
frames.text_en: Was this the work you originally wanted to do?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 工作里你最喜欢哪个部分？
frames.pinyin: gōngzuò lǐ nǐ zuì xǐhuan nǎ gè bùfen?
frames.text_en: What part of your work do you enjoy most?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你以后还想做这个工作吗？
frames.pinyin: nǐ yǐhòu hái xiǎng zuò zhège gōngzuò ma?
frames.text_en: Do you want to keep doing this work in the future?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Why's that?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: nà shì shénme yàng de gōngzuò?
frames.text_en: What kind of work is that exactly?

frames.text_en: What's that company like?

frames.text_en: What good food is there?

frames.pinyin: zuì yǒumíng de cài shì shénme?
frames.text_en: What is the most famous dish?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: What does it taste like?

frames.text_en: Can you make it yourself?

frames.pinyin: nǐ xiǎo shíhou cháng chī ma?
frames.text_en: Did you eat it a lot when you were young?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: nǐ yuànyì jiāo wǒ zěnme zuò ma?
frames.text_en: Would you be willing to teach me how to make it?

frames.pinyin: nǐ hé jiālǐ shuí zuì qīnjìn?
frames.text_en: Who in your family are you closest to?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你们最喜欢一起做什么？
frames.pinyin: nǐmen zuì xǐhuan yīqǐ zuò shénme?
frames.text_en: What do you most enjoy doing together?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: jiālǐ shuí duì nǐ zuì zhòngyào?
frames.text_en: Who in your family is most important to you?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你喜欢做什么？有什么特别的爱好？
frames.pinyin: nǐ xǐhuan zuò shénme? yǒu shénme tèbié de àihào?
frames.text_en: What do you like to do? Do you have any special hobbies?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Where do you do it?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你最喜欢这个爱好的哪一点？
frames.pinyin: nǐ zuì xǐhuan zhège àihào de nǎ yīdiǎn?
frames.text_en: What do you like most about this hobby?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: nǐ huì qù bié de dìfang zuò ma?
frames.text_en: Do you go to other places to do it?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你是怎么开始这个爱好的？
frames.pinyin: nǐ shì zěnme kāishǐ zhège àihào de?
frames.text_en: How did you start this hobby?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你一般自己做还是跟朋友一起？
frames.pinyin: nǐ yībān zìjǐ zuò háishì gēn péngyou yīqǐ?
frames.text_en: Do you usually do it alone or with friends?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: zhège àihào duì nǐ zhòngyào ma?
frames.text_en: Is this hobby important to you?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Have you been there?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Which trip was most memorable?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: What's special about that place?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: What good food is there?

frames.pinyin: nǐ shì gēn shéi yīqǐ qù de?
frames.text_en: Who did you go with?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text_en: Was it for work or for fun?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你旅行的时候喜欢自己去还是跟人一起？
frames.pinyin: nǐ lǚxíng de shíhou xǐhuan zìjǐ qù háishì gēn rén yīqǐ?
frames.text_en: When you travel, do you prefer to go alone or with others?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.pinyin: nǐ zuì xǐhuan nǎ cì lǚxíng?
frames.text_en: Which trip have you enjoyed the most?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 你为什么喜欢那个地方？
frames.pinyin: nǐ wèishénme xǐhuan nà ge dìfang?
frames.text_en: Why do you like that place?
frames.speaker: partner

frames.text: 那次旅行对你有什么特别的意义？
frames.pinyin: nà cì lǚxíng duì nǐ yǒu shénme tèbié de yìyì?
frames.text_en: What made that trip especially meaningful to you?
frames.speaker: partner
